data.title: Black Friday works for only a slice of B2B sellers
data.description: Core dna concludes that Black Friday’s usefulness in B2B depends more on operational maturity than marketing creativity.

data.title: David's Bridal rolls out BNPL across North America
data.description: In-store shoppers can now use Sezzle’s Pay-in-4 option to split purchases into four interest-free payments over six weeks. They can also pay in full using Sezzle’s checkout system. The BNPL launch coincides with the retailer’s holiday shopping promotions.

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond to acquire The Brand House Collective
data.description: The deal will be valued at $26.8 million as Bed Bath & Beyond acquired The Brand House Collective to form a new division called Beyond Retail Group.

data.title: Newegg to arrive in agentic commerce experiences using PayPal
data.description: Perplexity's AI-enabled search platform will be one place that Newegg's product listings show up with agentic commerce features enabled.

data.title: Kohl's ecommerce grows at double the rate of total Q3 sales
data.description: Newly appointed CEO Michael Bender said although Kohl's is still developing some of its technological initiatives — including AI adoption — it has already seen an improvement in customer engagement.
